title: Kamala Harris’s DNC speech, in one minute
description:
Vice President Kamala Harris caps the Democratic National Convention in Chicago on Aug. 22 with an acceptance speech as the party’s presidential nominee. Read more: https://wapo.st/3AuvclS. Subscribe to The Washington Post on YouTube: https://wapo.st/2QOdcqK
